title: Prescribing Trends of Adjuvant Neratinib in Hormone Receptor-Positive HER2-Positive Breast Cancer.
abstract: Neratinib is a potent tyrosine kinase inhibitor with activity against HER2-positive breast cancer (HER2+). The ExteNET study demonstrated a significant invasive disease-free survival benefit of neratinib in hormone receptor-positive (HR+) HER2+ breast cancer following trastuzumab-based adjuvant therapy. However, ExteNET was conducted before the use of pertuzumab or adjuvant trastuzumab emtansine (T-DM1). We evaluated clinical characteristics of patients prescribed neratinib in current practice.
